name: Texas State Board of Plumbing Examiners License Search

agency.name: Texas State Board of Plumbing Examiners

updateFrequency: unknown; the free licensee-list page states downloaded data are current as of the previous work day, but adapter freshness has not been implemented
licenseTypesIncluded: Texas plumbing licenses and registrations exposed through TSBPE public license search and licensee-list paths
knownExclusions: This source entry is scoped to plumbing licenses and registrations regulated by the Texas State Board of Plumbing Examiners.
Texas electrical, air conditioning and refrigeration, general contractor, local permit, and local registration records are outside this source entry.
The free licensee-list page describes downloadable lists, but no OpenTrade adapter has validated a stable file shape yet.
Searches or downloads requiring protected interactive workflows are not automated by OpenTrade Registry.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented. Future access should use official public lists responsibly and stay explicit opt-in for network retrieval.
publicRecordsNotes: Official plumbing-license metadata only. Absence from this source is not proof that a plumbing authorization, local permit, or other trade authorization does not exist elsewhere.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: The TSBPE free licensee-list page describes downloadable licensee lists, including journeyman, tradesman plumber-limited, apprentice, and plumbing inspector lists. File shape and terms require adapter review before support.
researchNotes: Registry-only source for TSBPE plumbing licenses and registrations. This source should be evaluated as a future bulk/local-file adapter candidate only after file-shape, privacy, and redistribution review.
verificationCaveats: This source covers Texas plumbing records, not TDLR electrical or air conditioning and refrigeration records.
No matching record means no match in this source at the checked time, not proof that a plumbing authorization, local permit, or other authorization does not exist elsewhere.
verificationNotes: No supported sync or verification adapter is exposed while official file shape and reuse terms remain under review.
maintainerNotes: Keep TSBPE plumbing records separate from TDLR all-license records and local permit data.

researchEvidence.note: Official TSBPE page reviewed; it lists plumbing license types including Tradesman Plumber-Limited, Journeyman Plumber, Master Plumber, and Plumbing Inspector.
Official TSBPE free licensee-list page reviewed; it describes downloadable licensee lists and states downloaded data are current as of the previous work day.

blocker.summary: Official lists and lookup paths exist, but no stable machine-readable file shape has been adapter-reviewed with offline fixtures yet.
